run_metadata.notes: Threat model: Embr handles authenticated social, creator marketplace, wallet, and messaging data. Practical attackers are anonymous users abusing public auth flows, authenticated users probing IDOR/data leakage, and XSS/CORS chains against browser sessions. Highest-value assets are JWT cookies, reset/verification tokens, wallet/order records, and private messages.

agent.name: security-and-privacy-auditor
agent.role: Finds practical auth, authorization, validation, secrets, CORS, and privacy defects.

findings.title: Tool endpoints use one shared workspace for all authenticated users

suggested_fix.approach: Derive workspace_root from user_id under a base path via WorkspacePolicy.workspace_root_for(user_id)
tests_needed: Two users with different JWTs cannot read each other's workspace files

history.notes: Imported from LYRA audit suite finding f-a50b7176 (PLP-562).
Implemented per-user workspace isolation via WorkspacePolicy. All 20 isolation tests pass.
Verified by source review: all tool file operations are scoped by authenticated user_id.

findings.description: Tool endpoints now derive workspace paths from the authenticated JWT subject. WorkspacePolicy creates base_workspace_dir/user_id sandboxes, ToolService requires user_id on public file operations, and routes pass current_user.user_id from the auth dependency.
findings.impact: Authenticated users no longer share one filesystem workspace through these tool endpoints; traversal checks also prevent paths from escaping the per-user sandbox.

proof_hooks.summary: WorkspacePolicy.workspace_root_for(user_id) creates and validates a per-user root under TOOL_WORKSPACE_BASE.
ToolService public methods require user_id and resolve paths through WorkspacePolicy.safe_path.
Tool routes require CurrentUser and pass current_user.user_id into ToolService for list/read/write/delete operations.
get_current_user validates Bearer JWT and rejects missing sub before constructing AuthenticatedUser.

next_actions.action: Verify and fix Tool endpoints use one shared workspace for all authenticated users
next_actions.rationale: Authenticated users no longer share one filesystem workspace through these tool endpoints; traversal checks also prevent paths from escaping the per-user sandbox.
